subject: WM-0161 ready for review
body: Drafted the authoritative PR-0 through PR-7 playable-product recovery roadmap; preserved M0-M8 as historical evidence; blocked legacy WM-0154 evidence closeout; kept WM-0155/0156 behind the blocker; created only proposed WM-0162 for integrated GameSession architecture planning; handoff, taskctl, diff and full quality gates pass.
